{"analysis":"The .dat file is 4MB - it could be a disk image. The .bin files are raw data. Let me search all these binary files for the password pattern using grep and strings. The password starts with '8XD' and ends with 'W54', is 23 chars long, uppercase letters and digits only.","plan":"1. Search all bin files and the dat file for the pattern '8XD' using grep with binary mode
2. Use strings to extract readable content from all binary files
3. Check if the dat file is a mountable disk image with debugfs","commands":[{"keystrokes":"grep -r '8XD' /app/varsea/ 2>/dev/null
","duration":1.0},{"keystrokes":"strings /app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat | grep -i 'password\|launchcode\|8XD\|W54'
","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"strings /app/varsea/backup-5bbc53a0/1761108157319017506.bin | grep -i 'password\|launchcode\|8XD\|W54'
","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"strings /app/varsea/data-815023d4/1761108157243430303.bin | grep -i 'password\|launchcode\|8XD\|W54'
